DataRequest.Name: Windows: Failed Logins with Different Accounts from Single Source System / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects suspicious failed logins with different user accounts from a single source system. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/builtin/win_susp_failed_logons_single_source.yml
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Failed Logins with Different Accounts from Single Source System to $hostName

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN ("Win-Security-4625","Win-Security-529") AND hostName NOT CONTAIN "DC"
